command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Watching Remy for YOUR mention for 75s ==="
echo "In the Telegram group, send: @RemyDeviDollz_bot are you there?"
START=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
for i in $(seq 1 15); do
  sleep 5
  NEW=$(journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "$START" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "message|inbound|agent|reply|response|-1003934415467|mention" | grep -viE "menu text|polling ingress|starting provider|pre-warmed")
  if [ -n "$NEW" ]; then
    echo "--- activity at +$((i*5))s ---"
    echo "$NEW" | tail -8
  fi
done
echo ""
echo "=== Final telegram activity ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "$START" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|message|agent|reply|A_ToolsX|join our channel" | grep -viE "menu text" | tail -15
echo ""
echo "=== Spam check: any 'join channel' or A_ToolsX in logs? (must be empty) ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "$START" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "A_ToolsX|join our channel|VIEW CHANNEL" | tail -3 || echo "NO SPAM - clean"
REMOTE
